name: LogRocket
description: Monitor LogRocket session replay platform for access and data privacy compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to LogRocket at https://app.logrocket.com
2. Go to Settings → API Tokens
3. Generate a new token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in LogRocket Settings → API Tokens

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews LogRocket organization members with access to session recordings

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies LogRocket is capturing sessions and monitoring application performance
